001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.app.Dialog;
004import android.os.Bundle;
005import android.view.LayoutInflater;
006import android.widget.ArrayAdapter;
007import android.widget.TextView;
008import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
009import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
010import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog;
011import androidx.fragment.app.DialogFragment;
012import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
013import com.google.android.material.datepicker.MaterialDatePicker;
014import com.google.android.material.dialog.MaterialAlertDialogBuilder;
015import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
017import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.DialogAddBatchBinding;
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.BatchViewModel;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.IncubatorViewModel;
022import java.time.Instant;
023import java.time.LocalDate;
024import java.time.ZoneId;
025import java.time.format.DateTimeParseException;
026import java.util.ArrayList;
027import java.util.List;
028import java.util.function.Consumer;
029
030/**
031 * Dialog fragment that collects user input for creating a new incubation batch.
032 *
033 * <p>This dialog allows the user to select an incubator, enter batch details,
034 * choose milestone dates, and save the batch through the {@link BatchViewModel}.
035 */
036@AndroidEntryPoint
037public class AddBatchDialogFragment extends DialogFragment {
038
039  private DialogAddBatchBinding binding;
040  private BatchViewModel batchViewModel;
041  private IncubatorViewModel incubatorViewModel;
042
043  private final List<Incubator> incubators = new ArrayList<>();
044
045  /**
046   * Creates and configures the dialog used to enter a new batch.
047   *
048   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
049   * @return configured dialog for batch creation.
050   */
051  @NonNull
052  @Override
053  public Dialog onCreateDialog(@Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
054    binding = DialogAddBatchBinding.inflate(LayoutInflater.from(requireContext()));
055
056    batchViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(BatchViewModel.class);
057    incubatorViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(IncubatorViewModel.class);
058
059    setupIncubatorDropdown();
060    setupDatePickers();
061
062    AlertDialog dialog = new MaterialAlertDialogBuilder(requireContext())
063        .setTitle(R.string.title_add_batch)
064        .setView(binding.getRoot())
065        .setNegativeButton(android.R.string.cancel, (dialogInterface, which) -> {})
066        .setPositiveButton(R.string.action_save, null)
067        .create();
068
069    dialog.setOnShowListener(d ->
070        dialog.getButton(AlertDialog.BUTTON_POSITIVE).setOnClickListener(v -> saveBatch()));
071
072    return dialog;
073  }
074
075  private void setupIncubatorDropdown() {
076    incubatorViewModel.getActiveIncubators().observe(this, incubatorList -> {
077      incubators.clear();
078      if (incubatorList != null) {
079        incubators.addAll(incubatorList);
080      }
081
082      List<String> labels = new ArrayList<>();
083      for (Incubator incubator : incubators) {
084        labels.add(incubator.getName());
085      }
086
087      ArrayAdapter<String> adapter = new ArrayAdapter<>(
088          requireContext(),
089          android.R.layout.simple_list_item_1,
090          labels
091      );
092      binding.incubator.setAdapter(adapter);
093    });
094  }
095
096  private void setupDatePickers() {
097    binding.dateSet.setOnClickListener(v ->
098        showDatePicker(selectedDate -> {
099          binding.dateSet.setText(selectedDate.toString());
100
101          if (isBlank(binding.lockdownDate)) {
102            binding.lockdownDate.setText(selectedDate.plusDays(18).toString());
103          }
104          if (isBlank(binding.expectedHatchDate)) {
105            binding.expectedHatchDate.setText(selectedDate.plusDays(21).toString());
106          }
107        })
108    );
109
110    binding.lockdownDate.setOnClickListener(v ->
111        showDatePicker(date -> binding.lockdownDate.setText(date.toString()))
112    );
113
114    binding.expectedHatchDate.setOnClickListener(v ->
115        showDatePicker(date -> binding.expectedHatchDate.setText(date.toString()))
116    );
117  }
118
119  private void showDatePicker(@NonNull Consumer<LocalDate> consumer) {
120    MaterialDatePicker<Long> picker = MaterialDatePicker.Builder.datePicker()
121        .build();
122
123    picker.addOnPositiveButtonClickListener(selection -> {
124      LocalDate date = Instant.ofEpochMilli(selection)
125          .atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault())
126          .toLocalDate();
127      consumer.accept(date);
128    });
129
130    picker.show(getChildFragmentManager(), "date_picker");
131  }
132
133  private void saveBatch() {
134    clearErrors();
135
136    Integer batchNumber = parseInteger(textOf(binding.batchNumber));
137    String breed = textOf(binding.breed);
138    String incubatorName = textOf(binding.incubator);
139    LocalDate dateSet = parseDate(textOf(binding.dateSet));
140    LocalDate lockdownDate = parseDate(textOf(binding.lockdownDate));
141    LocalDate expectedHatchDate = parseDate(textOf(binding.expectedHatchDate));
142    Integer numEggsSet = parseInteger(textOf(binding.numEggsSet));
143    String notes = textOf(binding.notes);
144
145    boolean valid = true;
146
147    if (batchNumber == null) {
148      binding.batchNumberLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_batch_number_required));
149      valid = false;
150    }
151
152    if (breed.isBlank()) {
153      binding.breedLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_breed_required));
154      valid = false;
155    }
156
157    Incubator selectedIncubator = findIncubatorByName(incubatorName);
158    if (selectedIncubator == null) {
159      binding.incubatorLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_incubator_required));
160      valid = false;
161    }
162
163    if (dateSet == null) {
164      binding.dateSetLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_date_required));
165      valid = false;
166    }
167
168    if (lockdownDate == null) {
169      binding.lockdownDateLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_date_required));
170      valid = false;
171    }
172
173    if (expectedHatchDate == null) {
174      binding.expectedHatchDateLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_date_required));
175      valid = false;
176    }
177
178    if (numEggsSet == null || numEggsSet <= 0) {
179      binding.numEggsSetLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_egg_count_required));
180      valid = false;
181    }
182
183    if (dateSet != null && lockdownDate != null && lockdownDate.isBefore(dateSet)) {
184      binding.lockdownDateLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_lockdown_before_set));
185      valid = false;
186    }
187
188    if (lockdownDate != null && expectedHatchDate != null
189        && expectedHatchDate.isBefore(lockdownDate)) {
190      binding.expectedHatchDateLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_hatch_before_lockdown));
191      valid = false;
192    }
193
194    if (!valid || selectedIncubator == null || batchNumber == null || dateSet == null
195        || lockdownDate == null || expectedHatchDate == null || numEggsSet == null) {
196      return;
197    }
198
199    Batch batch = new Batch();
200    batch.setBatchNumber(batchNumber);
201    batch.setIncubatorId(selectedIncubator.getId());
202    batch.setDateSet(dateSet);
203    batch.setLockdownDate(lockdownDate);
204    batch.setExpectedHatchDate(expectedHatchDate);
205    batch.setNumEggsSet(numEggsSet);
206    batch.setNotes(notes.isBlank() ? null : notes);
207    batch.setBatchStatus("ACTIVE");
208
209    batchViewModel.saveWithInitialEggGroups(batch, breed)
210        .thenAccept(batchId -> {
211          if (isAdded()) {
212            requireActivity().runOnUiThread(this::dismiss);
213          }
214        })
215        .exceptionally(throwable -> {
216          if (isAdded()) {
217            requireActivity().runOnUiThread(() ->
218                binding.notesLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_save_batch)));
219          }
220          return null;
221        });
222  }
223
224  private void clearErrors() {
225    binding.batchNumberLayout.setError(null);
226    binding.incubatorLayout.setError(null);
227    binding.breedLayout.setError(null);
228    binding.dateSetLayout.setError(null);
229    binding.lockdownDateLayout.setError(null);
230    binding.expectedHatchDateLayout.setError(null);
231    binding.numEggsSetLayout.setError(null);
232    binding.notesLayout.setError(null);
233  }
234
235  @Nullable
236  private Integer parseInteger(@NonNull String value) {
237    if (value.isBlank()) {
238      return null;
239    }
240    try {
241      return Integer.valueOf(value);
242    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
243      return null;
244    }
245  }
246
247  @Nullable
248  private LocalDate parseDate(@NonNull String value) {
249    if (value.isBlank()) {
250      return null;
251    }
252    try {
253      return LocalDate.parse(value);
254    } catch (DateTimeParseException e) {
255      return null;
256    }
257  }
258
259  @NonNull
260  private String textOf(@NonNull TextView view) {
261    return view.getText() == null ? "" : view.getText().toString().trim();
262  }
263
264  private boolean isBlank(@NonNull TextView view) {
265    return textOf(view).isBlank();
266  }
267
268  @Nullable
269  private Incubator findIncubatorByName(@NonNull String name) {
270    for (Incubator incubator : incubators) {
271      if (name.equals(incubator.getName())) {
272        return incubator;
273      }
274    }
275    return null;
276  }
277
278  /**
279   * Clears the view binding reference when the fragment view is destroyed.
280   */
281  @Override
282  public void onDestroyView() {
283    binding = null;
284    super.onDestroyView();
285  }
286}
